_comment: Localization file for bot messages. Add translations here. If a key is missing, the default message from code will be used.
welcome_message:
Welcome to the Video Submission Bot!

Send me a video to submit it for publication.
video_sent_to_moderation: Your video has been sent for moderation.
video_approved_queued: Your video has been approved and added to the publication queue.
video_not_approved: Your video was not approved for publication.
video_scheduled: Publication of your video is scheduled for {scheduled_time}.
unauthorized_action: You are not authorized to perform this action.
video_already_processed: This video has already been processed
video_already_published_or_rejected: This video has already been published or rejected
unauthorized_command: ❌ You are not authorized to use this command.
schedule_quick_title:
⚡ Quick Schedule — video {video_id}
Select time from now:
schedule_choose_date_title:
📅 Choose Date — video {video_id}
Select a date:
schedule_time_in_past: Selected time is in the past. Please choose a future time.
error_video_processed_or_timeout: This video has already been processed or timed out
error_sending_to_moderation: Error sending video for moderation. Please try again.
error_unauthorized_action: You are not authorized to perform this action.
error_time_in_past: Selected time is in the past. Please choose a future time.
video_scheduled_notification: Your video has been scheduled for publication at {scheduled_time}.
user_blacklisted: ❌ You are not allowed to submit videos.
blacklist_user_not_found: ℹ️ User `{user_id}` not found in blacklist.
blacklist_invalid_user_id: ❌ Invalid user ID. Please provide a numeric ID.
blacklist_clear_all_confirm:
⚠️ *WARNING*: This will remove ALL users from the blacklist.

Are you sure?
blacklist_usage:
❌ Invalid syntax.

*Usage:*
`/b` — show blacklist
`/b <user_id>` — add user
`/b clear <user_id>` — remove user
`/b clear all` — clear all
duplicate_pending: This video is already pending moderation.
duplicate_queued: This video has already been approved and is queued for publication.
duplicate_scheduled: This video has already been scheduled for publication.
duplicate_published: This video has already been published.
duplicate_exists: This video has already been submitted.
